aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to a lack of conversational content and structured data that aligns with AI query patterns.
quick_wins: Implement FAQ content with structured data (FAQPage schema).
Enhance service pages with HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized but can benefit from more posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: Lack of engagement with customer Q&A.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any inconsistencies due to third-party changes.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for service processes

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content tailored for AI queries.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC repair and maintenance tips.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQ content and FAQPage schema to address common customer questions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as HVAC experts by creating in-depth HowTo guides and obtaining relevant certifications.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise AI-friendly.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, you're missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search users.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with FAQ and HowTo schema consistently rank higher in AI-driven search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, conversational content, and authority signals to make your business the top choice for AI assistants.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI; act now to secure your position.
